RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MEDIATECHNICS CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff has adequately pled facts to allege breach of contract and fraud. On the face of the complaint, Plaintiff is not barred by the Statute of Limitations or Statute of Frauds. Defendant raises issues of fact that are not the subject of a demurrer. The request for judicial notice is not opposed and so is granted, but not for the truth of the statements in those items. E.g., Ragland v. U.S. Bank Natl. Assn., __Cal.App.4th__ (September 11, 2012, No. G 045580).
